pipelineName.title: Pipeline Name
pipelineName.description: The name of the CodePipeline pipeline this stage belongs to

pipelineArn.title: Pipeline ARN
pipelineArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pipeline

stageName.title: Stage Name
stageName.description: The name of the stage in the pipeline

stageOrder.title: Stage Order
stageOrder.description: The sequential order of the stage within the pipeline

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: The list of actions that are part of this stage

blockers.title: Blockers
blockers.description: The list of blockers (gates) defined for this stage
